text.message: Yall make wood like it’s candy tbf
I mean I’m no where close. Would if I could
Yeah they nearly he’s ace a city too
Y you have a wood port
This is why settling first is horrible
Get robbed 7 times and now I’m in 3rd/last
And green you better move the robber…can’t believe you gave red a city
I am officially in dead last
Rob me and face consequences green
If I don’t get back that wheat I am robbing you for the rest of game
i can give you 2 cards back
Green was willing to give you two cards
I didn’t wanna push my luck I’m already doing so bad
I need it for devs myself
Next time I’ll rob your wheat if I need
Then don’t bully me into giving you a wheat
But I have a knight so it’s okay
Your wheat will come in handy
You aren’t going to beat green to army but I can
Yeah but better than I get it than green
And your selfishness, bullying me into giving what when you couldn’t even use it, cost me army
I can help only if you’re honest rn
I can help you take road
Oh you had mono the whole time and chose not to use it
No, cause I played a knight
Need to block sheep brick or wood red
And red will give 2 wood because they know you need it
i am not the block here
Should have been a solo or red/green
I moved it off the five wood
But Red is eight with a city and four settles
I think it’s blue before red personally
Solo blue and I’ll help you road
I can try and take road
Port me some wood and brick if you want blue
Can give brick on your turn
guys i need to take road
Green I need all your cards
